div.div:
User / Codex / Docs
- ユーザーが要件や prompt を渡す
- SKILL.md / README のルールに従う
- ALIBABA_API_KEY や ZAI_API_KEY の有無を前提にする

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 234), rgb(29, 23, 11)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(229, 192, 123), rgb(99, 67, 8));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
scripts/run-claude-team.ps1
1. PromptFile / PromptText を UTF-8 で読み込む
2. DEBUG_PATH を決める
3. CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 を設定
4. -Provider Auto / AlibabaCloud / Zai / None を解決
5. 実行後に親シェルの env を元へ戻す

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 251, 244), rgb(16, 26, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(169, 214, 181), rgb(35, 74, 46));

div.div:
Provider resolver
- Auto: ALIBABA_API_KEY を優先
- なければ ZAI_API_KEY
- どちらもなければ None
- 既存の -UseAlibabaCloud も利用可
- -UseZai で明示的に切替可

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(233, 247, 236), rgb(19, 31, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 544px; height: 1px; padding-top: 901px; margin-left: 105px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
AlibabaCloud preset
ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = ALIBABA_API_KEY
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = DashScope Anthropic endpoint
ANTHROPIC_MODEL = qwen3.5-plus

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(233, 247, 236), rgb(19, 31, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.div:
Z.ai preset
ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = ZAI_API_KEY
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic
API_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000000
default models = glm-4.5-air / glm-4.7

div.div:
Claude Code CLI process
- claude -p --debug-file ... を実行
- provider ごとの env を使って応答を取得
- task によっては --dangerously-skip-permissions を追加

div.div:
Result / Debug log / Team-mode evidence
- 標準出力の返答
- DEBUG_PATH
- `spawnInProcessTeammate` などの証跡
- 実行後は env を復元
